for_sales.sales_text:
Lovingly restored traditional mahogany sailing boat, double diagonally planked hull, epoxy sealed for durability. Gunter rigged, with jib, and a wooden mast, boom and bow sprit. The boat is fitted with a lifting galvanised iron keel and rudder. Included is a 1,300 kg road trailer (new axle and brakes 2020), ensuring safe and easy transport. Believed to have been built in 1920’s at a boatyard in Poole. Beautifully restored in 2020, including a new cockpit cover, main sail and boom cover(2020).

Other items included are fenders, sole boards, anchor, boat pole. She has been lovingly maintained since then, and sailed in Poole Harbour.

Also available for sale, but not included in this price is a 10 foot tender, and a TORQEEDO electric motor. Located in Poole, Dorset, this classic beauty is ready for its next careful owner and adventure.

boat.full_description:
Lovingly restored traditional mahogany sailing boat, double diagonally planked hull, epoxy sealed for durability. Believed to have been built in 1920’s at a boatyard in Poole. Beautifully restored in 2020 she has been lovingly maintained since then, and sailed in Poole Harbour.

Gunter rigged, with jib, and a wooden mast, boom and bow sprit. The boat is fitted with a lifting galvanised iron keel and rudder. Classic day sailing boat
boat.name: Quenelle

ownerships.note: please check this is not a namesake
